name: Cape Cod Cranberry-Blueberry Crisp
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Arrowroot powder (use cornstarch as substitute)
3/4 cup Whole wheat pastry flour or unbleached all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl combine the blueberries, cranberries, maple syrup, currants, arrowroot or cornstarch, and lemon juice.
3. Lightly oil a 9-inch by 13-inch baking dish.
4. Add the fruit mixture into the prepared baking dish.
5. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, oats, almonds, sesame seeds, and cinnamon.
6. Sprinkle with apple juice and mix well.
7. Spoon the dry ingredients over the fruit.
8. Bake for about 40 minutes or until lightly browned.
